infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Techwheels Service to access your camera for job card photos and document scans.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Techwheels Service to access your photos to attach media to job cards and reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Techwheels Service to save generated reports and exported media to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Techwheels Service to access your location to geotag job activity and reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow Techwheels Service to access your location in the background for field-service continuity.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Techwheels Service to use Face ID for secure sign-in and sensitive actions.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Techwheels Service to access your camera for job card photos and document scans.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Techwheels Service to use your microphone while recording service videos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Techwheels Service to access your photos to attach media to job cards and reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Techwheels Service to use your camera to capture photos and videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Techwheels Service to use your microphone while recording videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Techwheels Service to access your location to geotag job activity and reports.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Techwheels Service to access your location in the background for route and field-service continuity.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Techwheels Service to use Face ID for secure sign-in and sensitive actions.
